chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. S-80 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. O R D E R. 07-07-2025. Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqi advocate for respondents No. 12 to 19. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant AAG, Sindh along with Inspector Syed, SIP Gul Muhammad of PS Khnejo and SIP Manzar Ahmed of PS Daharki. _____*******______ Mr. Aamir Abro advocate holds brief for Mr. Tariq Hanif G.Mangi advocate for the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondents No. 12 to 19 states that neither the private respondents have harassed the petitioner nor intent to do so in future. Learned Assistant A.G files statement on behalf of respondent No. 7, which is taken on record and further states that official respondents are legally bound to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner if and when he approaches them. Order accordingly. In view of above, instant petition stands disposed of. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
